task: Binary classification: Long Stay (>7 days) vs Normal Stay

fairness_audit_findings.interpretation: Model shows concerning disparities that would block clinical deployment under ONC HTI-1. Findings are partially driven by small test set sizes and should be validated with bootstrap confidence intervals in a production workflow.

known_limitations: Synthetic Synthea data — not real clinical signal
Small test set (166) limits subgroup analysis reliability
admission_year feature shows Synthea temporal artifacts
